taskTitle: Learn about the categories of Tawhid (Rububiyyah, Uluhiyyah, Asma wa Sifat)
subtaskTitle: Study Tawhid al-Asma wa al-Sifat — Names and Attributes
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Study Tawhid al-Asma wa al-Sifat — Names and Attributes' under the parent task 'Learn about the categories of Tawhid (Rububiyyah, Uluhiyyah, Asma wa Sifat)' (module: faith_shahada_growth), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: What are the primary ayat, particularly Surah Al-A'raf 7:180 which commands invoking Allah by His most beautiful names and Surah Ash-Shura 42:11 which establishes that there is nothing like Him, that directly anchor the scriptural foundation for Tawhid al-Asma wa al-Sifat?

Which authentic narrations in Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim, specifically the definitive hadith stating that Allah has ninety-nine names and whoever preserves them will enter Paradise, contextually anchor the theological study of His divine Names and Attributes?
